records.m_Talk_ENG: If that's the case, the Front Bay's Grand Dimension Crevice will proceed according to Thagirion's plans.

records.m_Talk_FRA: If that's the case, the Front Bay's Grand Dimension Crevice will proceed according to Thagirion's plans.

records.m_Talk_FRA: What's the status of the Administration Direct Control City?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Front Bay bulwark had already been predicted to fail since the previous Black Flood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Front Bay bulwark had already been predicted to fail since the previous Black Flood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Front Bay bulwark had already been predicted to fail since the previous Black Flood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, under Senior's orders, the bulwark was opened to minimize damage, and pirates and hunters were united to repel Kraken once.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take over the report from here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Front Bay bulwark has been destroyed by a direct strike from Kraken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Front Bay bulwark has been destroyed by a direct strike from Kraken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Front Bay bulwark has been destroyed by a direct strike from Kraken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It can no longer function as a bulwark.

records.m_Talk_FRA: It can no longer function as a bulwark.

records.m_Talk_FRA: And what appear to be roots extending from the Grand Dimension Crevice have begun overtaking Front Bay and the surrounding sea.

records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I apologize for failing to complete the mission.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, as the commanding officer on site, I judged this course to be the best possible choice for what comes next.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, as the commanding officer on site, I judged this course to be the best possible choice for what comes next.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, as the commanding officer on site, I judged this course to be the best possible choice for what comes next.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The past must feed into the future.

records.m_Talk_FRA: The past must feed into the future.

records.m_Talk_ENG: People must be able to think about tomorrow, not just today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: People must be able to think about tomorrow, not just today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: People must be able to think about tomorrow, not just today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That belief hasn't changed since the day I first set out to sea twenty years ago. Nor now, after burying everything in the ocean and becoming a Senior.

records.m_Talk_FRA: That belief hasn't changed since the day I first set out to sea twenty years ago. Nor now, after burying everything in the ocean and becoming a Senior.

records.m_Talk_FRA: If we activate the Track Switcher and halt the Apostle's advance but lose our forces in the process...

records.m_Talk_DEU: Then we would be losing our future.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then we would be losing our future.

records.m_Talk_FRA: The fact that you dispatched your valuable personnel to regions where the Guardian of Sephira could appear...

records.m_Talk_FRA: It must mean you believed I could bring them all back alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that belief is what I valued most in you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that belief is what I valued most in you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that belief is what I valued most in you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An unyielding heart. The unshakable conviction in yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An unyielding heart. The unshakable conviction in yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An unyielding heart. The unshakable conviction in yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And an endless faith in humanity.

records.m_Talk_FRA: And an endless faith in humanity.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Bonny's unwavering faith in you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Has finally been proven correct.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Has finally been proven correct.

records.m_Talk_DEU: But the Guardian of Sephira did descend into reality after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the Guardian of Sephira did descend into reality after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I'm concerned that its arrival will further weaken the dimension surface of the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I'm concerned that its arrival will further weaken the dimension surface of the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I'm concerned that its arrival will further weaken the dimension surface of the Normalside.
